title: Jump Quantative Trading
author: false-9-
selftext: Sure many of you might of used Cos before, there’s another one recently started called Jump. It’s legitimate, you can make a lot of money from it as long as you don’t get greedy and take your money before it shuts down. There’s another one started up called Jump, https://jumptdd1.top/#/register?code=9G4ALL If you need a hand setting up let me know

comments.author: Born_Translator_1649
comments.body:
Jump Tradiny is the newest version of quantitative trading, months newer than COS and is the highest growing platform out there with a $200 sign up bonus and fantastic user benefits.

https://jumptda.com/#/register?code=APNIST

Simply deposit over $50 (around £45) and you will be entitled to unlock VIP LEVEL 1 and get 4 quantitative trades per day

comments.author: Foreign-End-9777
comments.body: When will this one crash (estimate ) and when did it start

replies.author: false-9-
replies.body: Started in September, not sure when it will go down but other ones go for close to a year

replies.body: No mate, servers got too busy with the amount of people swapping from cos. Try this link https://jotdy1.com/
